editing_rules: Use this file as the canonical implementation checklist for the initiative.
Work one feature at a time and only flip passes to true after evidence-backed verification.
Keep the plan, session state, and progress log synchronized with real repository state.

features.description: Bootstrap the initiative and repair governance blockers so exec-plan validation is usable during the implementation.
steps: Create the active initiative plan and JSON state trio under docs/exec-plans/active.
Repair the broken local markdown link reported by ./scripts/execplan/check.sh.
Refresh baseline evidence for PYTHONPATH=src pytest -m "not integration" and the exec-plan validator.

features.description: Expand config, models, exceptions, backend protocols, and session lifecycle/artifact behavior to match the productionized contract.
steps: Add richer config fields, run/session/artifact models, and the broader exception hierarchy.
Extend backend/base.py and backend/modal_backend.py with resource controls and artifact file read/download support.
Upgrade sync and async sessions with lifecycle metadata, run sequencing, artifact capture, preview, and download semantics.

features.description: Add durable local JSON state and a thin manager layer for cross-process session reuse and run/artifact lookup.
steps: Add state.py with stored session/run persistence.
Add manager.py built on top of the session API.
Cover state and manager behavior with unit tests and keep attach/reattach semantics explicit.

features.description: Add a scriptable CLI and Modal environment diagnostics with stable JSON mode and predictable exit codes.
steps: Add diagnostics.py and environment-safe diagnostics tests.
Add cli.py for doctor/session/run/artifact flows plus serve wiring if the server ships.
Update packaging exports and tests without making the CLI environment-coupled.

features.description: Ship the optional FastAPI service only if it lands as a thin wrapper over manager/state with route tests and HTTP error mapping.
steps: Add the server package behind the server extra only after manager/state are in place.
Map domain exceptions to explicit HTTP responses instead of default 500s.
Add direct route tests and a local smoke path before documenting or exposing serve.

features.description: Update docs, schema references, packaging, and CI to reflect the broader operator surface while preserving repo governance checks.
steps: Update README, architecture/design/testing docs, and generated schema references.
Add project metadata, console script, optional extras, py.typed, build smoke checks, and wheel verification.
Merge CI changes so exec-plan validation remains alongside lint/type/test/package/CLI smoke coverage.
